Nicktoons.uk.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Alvin goes all out to make a new friend in 'Talking Teddy's Revenge', then in 'Snail-A-Palooza', Alvin lies to Theodore about a fake holiday to get out of chores, but things soon get real.

Nicktoons.uk.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
Nicktoons.uk.desc: A concert promoter wants to send SpongeBob and Squidward on the road, until greedy Mr. Krabs decides to manage them - and their "world tour" - himself.

Nicktoons.uk.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
Nicktoons.uk.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to join the extreme sports team The Drasticals in 'Extreme Spots', and then in 'Squirrel Record', Sandy finds a book of world records and tries to break them all.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Camp Harmony is tested with the arrival of a wolf in 'The Wild Ways of Wild the Wolf', then in 'More Bang For Your Buck', Elliot saves Ian's life by accident.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Boog gets taken hostage by the spoiled and entitled pets of the high security Pet Palace. Now the campers have to work together so they can break their buddy out.

Nicktoons.uk.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Dave enforces strict study rules after Alvin blames him for bad grades in 'Alvin Gets Schooled', then in 'My Life As a Dog', Theodore acts as a dog.

Nicktoons.uk.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Theo's art project gains fans but then gets hacked in 'Mr. Lou', then in 'Love Song', Simon panics when Dave's song reveals his poem.

Nicktoons.uk.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Plankton teams up with Man Ray to take over the Krusty Krab and the world in 'Super Evil Aquatic Villain Team Up Is Go!', and in 'Chum Fricassee', Squidward quits the Krusty Krab to work for Plankton.

Nicktoons.uk.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
Nicktoons.uk.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick go on an advertising blitz in 'The Good Krabby Name', and in 'Move It or Lose It', Mr. Krabs and Plankton issue petitions to get their rival's restaurant bulldozed.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: The Mole rats are planning to have a party in 'Camp Times Two', then in 'Straight from the Horse's Mouth', The campers help a horse get his groove back.
